name: P2714 work order includes real part numbers and prices
turns: 2017 Lexus GX460 P2714 shift solenoid stuck off, can you get me a work order
final_output:
WORK ORDER — 2017 GX460 — P2714 Shift Solenoid Stuck Off
====================================================

TASK BREAKDOWN
--------------

1. Transmission Access & Preparation — 1.0 hrs
   • Raise vehicle on lift (15 min)
   • Remove underbody shields/covers to access transmission area (10 min)
   • Drain ATF from transmission (15 min)
   • Remove transmission oil pan to access valve body (20 min)

2. Shift Solenoid S2 Removal & Bench Testing — 0.7 hrs
   • Remove shift solenoid valve S2 from valve body (15 min)
   • Measure S2 resistance (5 min)
   • Apply 12 V to S2 and verify it moves and makes an operating noise (5 min)
   • If defective, replace shift solenoid valve S2 (15 min)

3. Valve Body Access, Reassembly & S2 Reinstallation — 0.9 hrs
   • Reinstall shift solenoid valve S2 into valve body (15 min)
   • Reinstall valve body assembly with associated gaskets/seals (20 min)
   • Reinstall transmission oil pan sub-assembly with new gasket and bolts (20 min)

4. ATF Refill — 1.0 hrs
   • Refill ATF WS to proper level using overflow-fill method (20 min)
   • Confirm fluid level and top off as needed (15 min)
   • Check for leaks and secure lines/hoses (10 min)
   • Verify ATF temperature/flow condition and finalize fill (15 min)

5. Final System Check & Test Drive — 0.5 hrs
   • Start engine, cycle through gears, and verify shift pattern in D/S positions (10 min)
   • Road test to confirm normal operation and absence of slipping/harsh shifts (15 min)
   • Clear codes (if any) and confirm no MIL illumination (5 min)
   • Post-test data check and final documentation (5 min)

PARTS REQUIRED
--------------
  Part Description          | OEM Part #     | Qty | Unit Price  | Total
  ————————————————————————————————————————————————————————————————————————
  Automatic Transmission Control Solenoid (Shift Solenoid S2) | 3529034010 | 1 | $293.23 | $293.23
  Gasket, Automatic Transmission Oil Pan | 3516860010 | 1 | $35.58  | $35.58
  Ring, O For Oil Strainer | 9030131014 | 1 | $4.81   | $4.81
  Transmission Oil Filter | 3533060070 | 1 | $67.51  | $67.51
  (Notes: ATF WS is required for refill but is not listed in catalog data here. If you supply ATF WS separately, add it as a separate line item with the OEM spec and price.)

SUMMARY
-------
 Labour:
   Transmission Access & Preparation      1.0 hrs
   Shift Solenoid S2 Removal & Bench Test  0.7 hrs
   Valve Body Access & Reassembly          0.9 hrs
   ATF Refill                               1.0 hrs
   Final Check & Test Drive                 0.5 hrs
   ─────────────────────────────────────────
   Total Labour                          4.1 hrs × $100.00/hr = $410.00

 Parts:
   Automatic Transmission Control Solenoid    $293.23
   Oil Pan Gasket                               $35.58
   Oil Strainer O-Ring                           $4.81
   Transmission Oil Filter                        $67.51
   Subtotal                                      $401.13

  Subtotal                                              $811.13
  Tax (13%)                                             $105.45
  ════════════════════════════════
  TOTAL                                                 $916.58

Notes and assumptions:
- This work order targets addressing a suspected S2 solenoid fault contributing to a P2714-like condition by replacing the shift solenoid S2 and reseating the valve body as needed per service procedures.
- ATF drain is performed in the Access & Preparation group; ATF refill is a separate group per guidelines.
- Torque figures explicitly used from service manual context where applicable:
  • Oil Pan bolts: install with 7.0 N·m torque (per oil pan reinstallation guidance)
  • Transmission wire connector bolt: 5.4 N·m (for securing the transmission wire harness)
  • Any other bolts referenced in these steps should be torqued to their respective values per the manual when reassembling the related components.

If you’d like, I can adjust the work order for a different labor rate, tax rate, or include additional items (e.g., wheel alignment, battery/systems checks, or a formal DTC clear report).

name: P2714 diagnosis starts correctly
turns: 2017 Lexus GX460 throwing P2714, shift solenoid SLT performance issue
final_output: According to the service manual, P2714 points to a fault in shift solenoid valve SLT. The first diagnostic step is to test SLT resistance (between terminals 1 and 2) at 20°C; the spec is 5.0 to 5.6 Ω. Have you performed this SLT resistance test, and if so, what resistance did you read?
